# Studio Graffiti

> A small independent studio. We design brands, interfaces, and the edges in between.

Studio Graffiti is an independent brand and product design studio. We work
with founders and teams on identity, web, and product interfaces, with
selective engagements in AI tooling.

## Sections

- [Selected work](https://studio-graffiti.pl/work): case studies from recent client engagements
- [Services](https://studio-graffiti.pl/services): brand, web, and AI design offerings
- [Blog](https://studio-graffiti.pl/blog): notes on design practice, process, and tools

## Contact

Reach out through the site's contact section for new project inquiries.
